ques: Search for Lionel Messi's last 5 games, which teams has he played for, and what are the results?
answer: In his last 5 games, Lionel Messi played for Inter Miami CF in all of them. Results: W 6-4 vs Philadelphia (5/24), W 2-0 vs Portland (5/17), W 5-3 @ Cincinnati (5/13), W 4-2 @ Toronto (5/9), and L 4-3 vs Orlando (5/2) — 4 wins and 1 loss.
